payload.answer: I couldn’t remember the article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error. No memory was saved to avoid inventing unsupported claims.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to the provided 404 network error, so no durable source claims can be extracted or stored.

details: No article claims were committed to memory.

repair_options: Ask to save only the URL and your stated reason as a bookmark-style memory.
